sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ulid (id UInt64, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now(), ulid UUID) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_ulid SET ulid = toUUID('abcdef01-2345-6789-abcd-ef0123456789') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, ulid FROM test_ulid WHERE ulid IS NOT NULL;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_ulid WHERE ulid = toUUID('01234567-89ab-cdef-0123-456789abcdef');
